'''Zolo''' was the name of a squadron of [[CloakShape fighter/Legends|CloakShape]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] that were operated by the [[Loose Cannon pirates]]. ''Zolo 10'' and ''Zolo 11'' were involved in a [[Starfighter combat/Legends|skirmish]] between the Loose Cannons and the [[Azzameen family]] shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. However, both were destroyed after the Azzameens proved to be too tough to contain.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
